description_long: This is a single-tier, round cake with a rustic, semi-naked buttercream finish, allowing some of the cake layers to show through the thin white icing. The top of the cake is adorned with a small arrangement of green leaves and sprigs, giving it a natural, minimalist look. The cake sits on a scalloped-edge parchment or doily, which rests atop a thick, circular wooden slab with visible bark, adding to the rustic presentation. The wooden slab is placed on a dark, slate-like rectangular base, providing contrast and highlighting the cake. The cake appears moist and dense, with a smooth but slightly uneven icing application. No candles or additional decorations are present, emphasizing the simple, elegant style.
description: A rustic, semi-naked round cake with white buttercream icing and a small green leaf arrangement on top, displayed on a wooden slab and dark base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's leafy decoration most prominently, with the rustic icing and wooden slab clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the cake and the leafy topper extending outward, with the wooden slab and scalloped doily visible.
description_view_2: The leafy decoration is seen from above, showing more of the cake's top surface and the uneven icing application.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the back side of the cake, with the leafy arrangement partially obscured and the rustic icing texture more apparent.
